name: ollama-torah-mcp
description: Torah Q&A MCP server powered by a local/remote Ollama instance — bilingual Hebrew/English halachic guidance with 6 specialized modes.

pillars.supervised: Read-only Torah Q&A — no destructive operations, no external writes
pillars.orchestrated: Single Ollama endpoint, structured tool responses with mode selection
pillars.secured: URL and model via env vars, Zod input validation, request timeout enforcement
pillars.agents: R=torah-knowledge, T=Ollama API, M=conversation context, P=chat completion
